narrative:
Nuno Mendes is Portugal's highly-rated Left-Back, boasting an overall rating of 7.87/10. This places him in the top 1% of left-backs at this tournament, with a rating range of 7.43–8.3 reflecting a strong match sample. Notably, 65% of his rating comes from his club form over the last two seasons, with 35% from this World Cup.

At this World Cup, Mendes demonstrates a significant offensive impact, scoring 0.359 goals per 90 min, well above his 0.06 expected goals per 90 min. He also contributes creatively with 2.151 key passes per 90 min and maintains defensive solidity with 1.076 tackles and 1.076 clearances per 90 min. His club statistics over the last two seasons, including 0.218 goals and 0.292 assists per 90 min, further highlight his consistent attacking output.

Mendes plays a vital role as an attacking full-back for his national team, providing both goal threat and creative passing from wide areas. Scouts and fans should continue to watch for his ability to convert chances and deliver crucial key passes in the remaining matches. His consistent defensive work, as evidenced by his tackles and clearances, will also be important to monitor.
